name: ruby-ntlm
title: ruby-ntlm
description:
NTLM authentication client for Ruby
NTLM (NT LAN Manager) is an authentication protocol used in various Microsoft
network protocol implementations. It employs a challenge-response mechanism
for authentication, in which clients are able to prove their identities
without sending a password to the server.
This Ruby library provides message creator and parser for the NTLM
authentication. It supports NTLM v1 only.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-ntlm because NTLM authentication client for Ruby.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-ntlm as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-ntlm with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-ntlm --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
